violations.text: Shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. During inspection the shellfish tags were observed without the date of last sold from original container. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2024

Various food items were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the 1-door reach-in unit. Refrigerator door gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/11/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the 2-door reach-in fan guards have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2024

The hot water handle for the hand sink by the ice machine was observed broken and unable to open valve for hot water. Establishment is to repair or replace handle. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2024

Prep unit 1 was observed held at 48 degrees Fahrenheit. Misc food items were observed held at 48 degrees. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Misc food items were voluntarily disposed of. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2023
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2023
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2023

Squid was observed thawing on the counter at 80 D F. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Squid was voluntarily disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay and the bar. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2023

Prep Unit 1 was observed held at 51 degrees Fahrenheit. Misc food items ere observed stored at 50 degrees. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food Items were voluntarily disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2023
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2023
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2023

The door to the outside, located in the kitchens, is being left open. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2023

The handle located in the on the prep unit is not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. The gasket on the refrigerator in the kitchen is in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2023
The floors in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/14/2023

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2023
The handle on the prep unit located in the was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2023
The floor between the back oven area and the main kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2023
